layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing, premium feel. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.hero_section: Must feature Miron's photo prominently with red/warm ambient CSS lighting (e.g., radial gradients behind or overlaying the photo). Overlaid on the photo must be a large glassmorphism panel (window) containing the primary text.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid protocol for features and info sections. Overlapping elements for artful tension.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Minimalist. Sticky crystal glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#1C1C1E]/60 border-b border-white/10). Active links have white underline.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-[#1C1C1E] font-medium rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors
buttons.glass: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-white/20 transition-all

cards.style: Glassmorphism panels strictly. rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl. bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-[20px] border border-white/15.

hero_photos.description: Miron Shakira secondary photo for about/specialists section

icons.usage: Use Lucide icons for UI elements. For the gold stars, use Star icon colored #FFB800 with fill-current where appropriate.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have smooth transitions (transition-all duration-300 ease-out).
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling. Staggered fade-up animations for glass panels on scroll.

instructions_to_main_agent: COMPLETELY REMOVE the existing light/warm theme. The new design is strictly DARK MODE.
Apply the background gradient (bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1C1C1E] to-[#262629]) to the main layout.
Ensure all text is white (#FFFFFF) or light grey (#E0E0E0) for readability.

Implement the Hero Section exactly as requested: Miron's photo as the background/main visual, enhanced with CSS radial-gradient to add red/warm dramatic lighting. Place a prominent glassmorphism panel (bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-[20px], border-white/15) OVER the photo containing the main headline and text.
Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text. Add these via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
Redesign all pages (Auth, Profile, Chat, Tariffs, etc.) using the glassmorphism card style.
Ensure the navigation menu is minimalist, with a burger menu for mobile, and active states showing an underline.
Incorporate gold stars (#FFB800) as decorative elements or rating icons where appropriate.
DO NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided Miron Shakira photos.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
